items.title: Getting to the Moon or Mars? Musk and Bezos Tackle Space Travel’s Refueling Problem
items.description: Spacecraft that could fuel up in orbit would be less weighted down at liftoff and fly deeper into space; making those refills happen is a big challenge for SpaceX and Blue Origin.

items.title: Why green aviation fuel failed to take off
items.description: For those flying south this summer, the prospect of “green fuel” one day powering their planes down to the south of France or the Med may mean a little less guilt over their climate-destroying air travel.

items.title: EXI: Industrials Dashboard For August
items.description: EXI offers global exposure and less concentration risk than XLI but underperformed. Check out the analysis of the industrial sector here.
